sections.description: Native SEO control layer for the RankRocket remediation pipeline. Manages title/meta, schema injection, image ALT text, llms.txt, XML sitemap, robots.txt, cache purge, and self-updates.
sections.changelog:
v2.9.0: Section classifier for llms.txt grouping; GET /llms/preview; _rrseo_llms_section per-post meta; expanded /llms config (business_facts, sections, exclude_patterns); GET /images/{id}/alt; batch cap on /images/bulk-alt; /status?include_counts=true with transient cache.
v2.8.0: Shared Canonical URL Set.
v2.7.0: GET/POST /robots-txt.
